title: SCP-005 | The Skeleton Key
description: An anomalous key that can open any lock.
body:
![Skeleton Key](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c08b63c9e6297a8daad96ee65e5520ffe6220355.png) *** **The Skeleton Key** mod adds three new items _(SCP, documentation and label)_ and one structure to the game. The mod is heavily inspired by **SCP-005** from the **SCP Foundation Universe**. **SCP-005** is an anomalous ornate key capable of opening **any** lock. In this mod, **SCP-005** can unlock any physical or digital lock, making it one of the most powerful and mysterious items you can obtain.    **●** Mod __made by __TheCaptainFoxy____ (me) ● My __first mod created with __MCreator____ **●** Mod inspired by __zcoper's mods__    __FAQ__ 
Spoiler

 ► Where can I find the mod content?

None of the items in this mod are craftable.  
SCP-005, its documentation, and its label can only be found inside the SCP-005 containment chamber structure.

 

► Where does the structure spawn?

The structure spawns in any Overworld biome at surface level, with approximately one structure every 3000 blocks. 

 

You can find it using /locate command

 

► What door is compatible with SCP-005?

The Skeleton Key can open any block that has the "open" property.  
SCP-005 can also activate, via redstone power, any door, trapdoor, or fence gate tagged as
"minecraft:doors", "minecraft:trapdoors", or "minecraft:fence_gates".

If you want to create a door mod compatible with SCP-005, make sure it meets these criteria.

 

► How can I place the document?

Right-click to read the document.  
Shift + right-click to place it.

 

 
*** ![SCP-005 Label](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9218df1389cc86ec607a46b1d8a2bcd9bda11ee5.png) *** ![Skeleton Key](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f06deaea18baf0dd4cdf8cf7fe486d163224530c.png) *** **SCP-005** is an anomalous ornate key capable of opening any lock. In this mod, **SCP-005** can unlock any physical or digital lock, making it one of the most powerful and mysterious items you can obtain. **SCP-005** can be placed by __Shift + right-clicking__ on a block.   __Right-clicking__ on a door/trapdoor/gate with SCP-005 will open it. It cannot close doors; in canon with the SCP Universe, it only opens locks. **SCP-005** can open **every** door in Minecraft and is compatible with **almost** every mod. *** ____Show all content____  
Spoiler

 

 

 

SCP-005 Containment Chamber

SCP-005 can only be found inside the SCP-005 Containment Chamber/Cell.  
The structure spawns in any Overworld biome at surface level and is relatively rare.

SCP-005 Document & SCP-005 Label

The SCP-005 documentation can be found inside the SCP-005 Containment Chamber together with the Skeleton Key.  
The document is readable, while the label provides information about the SCP’s classification and risk level.

   _● SCP Document: _  _[SCP-005 Document](https://scp-wiki.wikidot.com/scp-005)_ ● You have permission to use this mod in your modpacks! ● Check out my other Mods:[My Profile]([https://www.curseforge.com/members/thecaptainfoxy/projects](https://modrinth.com/user/TheCaptainFoxy))
